recommendations.title: Good Boys
recommendations.overview: A group of young boys on the cusp of becoming teenagers embark on an epic quest to fix their broken drone before their parents get home.

recommendations.title: Arthur: Malediction
recommendations.overview: Longtime Minimoys fan Alex is taken by his friends to the filming location for his 18th birthday, unaware that they're all in for a horrific time.

recommendations.title: Y2K
recommendations.overview: Two high school nobodies make the decision to crash the last major celebration before the new millennium on New Year's Eve 1999. The night becomes even crazier than they could have ever dreamed when the clock strikes midnight.

recommendations.title: Bound to Vengeance
recommendations.overview: A young woman, Eve, fights back and manages to escape a malicious abductor. However, after discovering she may not be the only victim, Eve unravels a darker truth and decides to turn the tables on her captor.

recommendations.title: Boogeyman 2
recommendations.overview: A young woman attempts to cure her phobia of the boogeyman by checking herself into a mental health facility, only to realize too late that she is now helplessly trapped with her own greatest fear.

recommendations.title: The Haunting of Molly Hartley

recommendations.title: Hello
recommendations.overview: An emotionally unavailable flight attendant meets a potential love interest and later finds out that her "perfect guy" has ulterior motives. As the clock ticks down on New Year's Eve, she must fight to keep her murdered ex-boyfriend's secrets or find

recommendations.title: Churchill
recommendations.overview: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 24 hours before D-Day.

recommendations.title: Stitches
recommendations.overview: The clumsy and unfunny clown Richard "Stitches" Grindle entertains at the 10th birthday party of little Tom, but the boy and his friends play a prank with Stitches, tying his shoelaces. Stitches slips, falls and dies. Six years later, Tom gives a bir

recommendations.title: The Best Century of My Life
